classData.description: The merge-request fields shared by the list and single-MR reads. Factored out so the two queries cannot drift apart.
classData.name: MERGE_REQUEST_FIELDS

classData.description: Lists a project's merge requests with optional state / author filters.
classData.name: LIST_MERGE_REQUESTS
GET_MERGE_REQUEST

classData.description: Resolves a merge-request iid to its opaque global id (gid://gitlab/MergeRequest/...) — required as the noteableId for the shared createNote comment mutation.
classData.name: GET_MERGE_REQUEST_GID
